basics.name: Alex Hiriavenko
basics.label: Fullstack Developer
basics.summary: Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience building healthcare digital products for a multi-location medical network: CRM, public website, patient cabinet, online consultations, appointment booking, payments, and Telegram bot workflows. Strong background in scalable APIs, PostgreSQL optimization, high-load interfaces, reusable frontend architecture, and reliable integrations for patient and staff workflows.

work.name: Palmo
work.summary: Developed and maintained ON Clinic's patient-facing digital platform and healthcare CRM modules for a multi-location medical network.
highlights: Developed and maintained ON Clinic's public medical website, patient cabinet, CRM modules, Telegram bot, and online appointment and payment workflows.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and API performance with caching and indexing.
Enhanced front-end interfaces and introduced reusable hooks/components to accelerate delivery.
Collaborated in agile teams with analysts, developers, QA, and DevOps.

work.name: DAN.IT
work.summary: Gained hands-on experience working in teams of 3-9 people on full-cycle projects.
highlights: Took the role of team lead in one project, coordinating task distribution and mentoring peers.
Built a social network project using React, Redux, and MUI.

work.name: Logika School
work.summary: Taught school-age students web development and frontend fundamentals, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript basics, and practical project structure.

education.institution: Donetsk National University of Economics and Trade

interests.name: Healthcare CRM, scalable APIs, performance optimization, reusable frontend architecture, AI-assisted development
